name: itcs-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ITCS (Innovations in Theoretical Computer Science) submissions published open-access in LIPIcs (Schloss Dagstuhl): the conceptual-novelty selection test that defines the venue, the single early-September annual deadline, lightweight double-blind HotCRP submission with full proofs, no rebuttal round, generous page budgets, the Graduating Bits culture, and the LIPIcs camera-ready. Grounded in the ITCS 2026 Bocconi call, itcs-conf.org, LIPIcs/DROPS, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
